attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT 
EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS.GES_DELETE_DATE as GES_DELETE_DATE, EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS.INVOICE_BATCH_ID as INVOICE_BATCH_ID, EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID as INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID, EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS.ORG_ID as ORG_ID, 
EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID as SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER as DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER, EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS.GLOBAL_NAME as GLOBAL_NAME, 
EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS.INVOICE_ID as INVOICE_ID 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIB_DELS
attributes.Lookup condition: DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER = in_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER AND GLOBAL_NAME = in_GLOBAL_NAME AND INVOICE_ID = in_INVOICE_ID
